_description: Canonical facts the ika-solana-prealpha skill MUST convey. Each fact lists ALL-of phrases that must co-occur in the skill bundle (SKILL.md + references/**). Use short lowercase substrings; match is case-insensitive after normalizing whitespace. Inverse facts assert absence.

facts.why: Upstream 2026-04-17 flipped the Mock Support table; old 'mock Sign always errors' story is dead.
PDA uses chunked ['dwallet','message_approval',scheme_u16_le,...digests] — not a flat triple.
Env table must carry the full canonical program id.
Env table must carry the full canonical gRPC URL.
HTTP 200 can still contain TransactionResponseData::Error; always deserialize.
SKILL.md lists the four CPI framework options.
SKILL.md names the ika TS client + @solana/kit pairing.
Plan part C: audit, audit-force, audit-fix must all surface.
drift-rules.mjs must be discoverable from SKILL.md or references.
Disambiguation from Encrypt + Sui + production custody.

warningFacts.why: Skill must actively warn against the old flat triple form.

forbiddenSubstrings.why: Old 'mock Sign always returns Error' story is gone post-2026-04-17.
